productDisplayName: Puma Men White & Black Contest Lo Casual Shoes
description: A pair of round-toed white and black casual shoes with central lace-ups and low-top stylingSynthetic upper with overlays, perforations and stitched detail, has branding on one side of the midfoot and on the backfoot, Puma Formstrip on either sideSoft tongue and inner, branding on the tongueCushioned footbed with branding on the heelThick and textured midsole with stitched detail, has branding on the backfoot regionTextured outsole with patterned grooves, has a pivot point on the forefoot and on the backfoot, has brandingWarranty: 3 months against manufacturing defects onlyWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
